nasb.text: And he entered the synagogue and continued speaking out boldly for three months, reasoning and persuading them about the kingdom of God.

esv.text: And he entered the synagogue and for three months spoke boldly, reasoning and persuading them about the kingdom of God.

cnv.text: 一連三個月，保羅都到會堂裡去，放膽宣講，辯論　神的國的事，勸導人。

ccb.text: 保罗一连三个月勇敢地在会堂里传道，与人辩论上帝国的事，劝导他们。

csbs.text: 保罗进了会堂，放胆传道，一连三个月讲论并劝导人相信那些有关神国的事。
